headline: NextEra Energy (NEE) Positions for the Next Decade of Utility Growth
summary: NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NEE) is included among the 15 Best Dividend Paying Stocks to Buy Right Now. NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NEE) is one of the world’s largest energy companies.
